ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "cookie_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "cookie_manager" TEXT /* Entity that manages the cookie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie's purpose */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date or duration of the cookie */,
  "cookie_type" TEXT /* Type of the cookie (e.g., Authentication, Tracking) */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain where the cookie is set */,
  "path" TEXT /* The path for which the cookie is valid */,
  "secure" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the cookie is set over a secure connection */,
  "http_only" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the cookie is accessible only through HTTP(S) requests */,
  "same_site" TEXT /* The SameSite attribute of the cookie (e.g., Lax, Strict, None) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_expiration FOREIGN KEY ("expiration") REFERENCES cookie_expirations ("expiration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_cookie_manager FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_manager") REFERENCES cookie_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_cookie_type FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_type") REFERENCES cookie_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity managing the cookie */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the cookie manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie manager's role */,
  "website" TEXT /* The website or domain managed by the cookie manager */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the cookie manager entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the cookie manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the preference */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie managing the preference */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., language, currency) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the preference was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the preference was last updated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser used to update the preference */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used to update the preference (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, data analyst) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie for which consent is given */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether consent is given */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the consent was given */,
  "revocation_date" TEXT /* Date the consent was revoked (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the consent was given or revoked */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser used to give or revoke consent */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used to give or revoke consent (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consent_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the cookie */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the cookie was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., set, read, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the cookie was used */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser used to interact with the cookie */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used to interact with the cookie (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_usage_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie type */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the cookie type (e.g., Strictly Necessary, Performance, Functional, Targeting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_expirations" (
  "expiration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration type */,
  "expiration_name" TEXT /* Name of the expiration type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expiration type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the expiration in days, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "entity_accessed" TEXT /* Entity accessed (e.g., cookie, preference) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser used to access the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used to access the data (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
